name: fullerdev
description: Opinionated OpenCode plugin for multi-agent orchestration. Specialized subagents, built-in MCPs, skills, hooks, tools — tuned for Azure DevOps workflows (Work Items, Git, Wiki, Pipelines).
author: Arthur

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external azure-devops-node-api --external zod && bun build src/tui/index.ts --outdir dist/tui --target node --external @opentui/core --external @opentui/solid --external @opencode-ai/plugin && bun run build:declarations
scripts.dev: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external azure-devops-node-api --external zod --watch
scripts.check:ci: bun run typecheck && bun run build
scripts.release:patch: bun x bumpx patch && git push --follow-tags && bun publish
scripts.release:minor: bun x bumpx minor && git push --follow-tags && bun publish
scripts.release:major: bun x bumpx major && git push --follow-tags && bun publish
